calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters. The will dated December 24, 2015 was admitted to probate.

Theodore Lee Krehbiel was appointed as Executor, with full IAEA authority. Bond was not required.

Amy Harrington was appointed probate referee.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for July 6, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
